summary: Iteration 94: Dashboard bugs verified fixed. Backend: 14/14 tests passed (100%). Bug #1 (empty compliance widget): compliance-en1090 now returns NF-2026-000002 (stato=chiuso) because it has 34 FT fields, excludes NF-2026-000001 (no FT data). Bug #2 (unreachable quality score): quality-score now uses adaptive categories - 'Sicurezza Cantieri' excluded (user has 0 rilievi/POS), score is 45/100 which is achievable.
critical_code_review_comments: dashboard.py L145-161: compliance-en1090 correctly filters commesse by stato != bozza AND (has FT data OR has classe_esecuzione)
dashboard.py L293-307: Sicurezza category only added when total_rilievi > 0 OR total_pos > 0
dashboard.py L277-283: CE category only added when en1090_count > 0 OR total_certs > 0
dashboard.py L310-316: Quality category only added when welders/instruments/audits present
dashboard.py L335-339: Score normalized to 100 based on raw_max of active categories only
seed_data_creation: Used existing user data - no new seed data created
context_for_next_testing_agent: Dashboard bugs are fixed. compliance-en1090 at GET /api/dashboard/compliance-en1090 now filters by fascicolo_tecnico data presence (not stato). quality-score at GET /api/dashboard/quality-score now uses adaptive categories - categories only appear when user has relevant data. Test user user_97c773827822 has: 2 commesse (1 with FT data), 5 invoices, 2 preventivi, 5 DDT, 3 welders, 0 rilievi, 0 POS, 0 certificazioni.

bug_1_compliance_widget_empty.after: Returns any commessa with FT data, regardless of stato (except bozza)
bug_1_compliance_widget_empty.evidence: NF-2026-000002 (stato=chiuso, 34 FT fields) now appears in widget

bug_2_quality_score_unreachable.before: All categories shown, making 65 points unreachable for users without rilievi/POS/CE
bug_2_quality_score_unreachable.after: Adaptive categories - Sicurezza only if has rilievi/POS, CE only if has EN1090 commesse/certs
bug_2_quality_score_unreachable.evidence: User with 0 rilievi/POS sees 5 categories (no Sicurezza), score 45/100 is achievable

test_classes: TestAuthRequirement (2 tests) - auth required for both endpoints
